headline: FIRST AGENT BASELINE for Aleph Alpha. CANONICAL CORRECTION: scanner-output composite 76.4 / Established does not match site/src/data/indexes/ai-labs.json which has Aleph Alpha at rank 2 / composite 81.4 / band exemplary (dimensions: AWR 4, EMP 4, ACT 4, EQU 3.5, BND 4, ACC 4, SYS 4, INT 4). Used canonical 81.4 as published baseline. Reconstructs to 73.4 from dimensions — MATH-HYGIENE FLAG +8.0 (parallel to Apptronik / 1X Technologies / Open Bionics ai-labs/robotics-labs cluster pattern). Per math-hygiene cluster protocol, the discrepancy is flagged but composite change is NOT proposed in evidence cycle pending data-team formula audit. In-window evidence: (1) April 24-27 2026 Cohere announced merger with Aleph Alpha at ~$20B combined valuation, anchored by $600M Schwarz Group commitment — STRUCTURAL EVENT, transatlantic AI powerhouse, Canadian-German government sovereign-tech-alliance support; (2) Aleph Alpha is a signatory to EU's General-Purpose AI Code of Practice (alongside Amazon, Anthropic, Google, IBM, Microsoft, OpenAI — 26 signatories) — pre-Aug-2 GPAI enforcement positive ACC/INT signal; (3) Aleph Alpha 2026 Global Recognition Award for sovereign AI infrastructure; (4) GDPR-native architecture with EU-only data residency and on-premises deployment options — structural ACC/BND positive. Net: dimensional evidence supports the existing dimensional profile (4.0 across, EQU 3.5); the merger is a SYS-positive (sovereign-tech transatlantic alliance) but introduces governance-transition risk that warrants 60-day re-evaluation. Math-hygiene flag raised; composite confirmed at 81.4 pending formula audit. Confidence Medium per first-baseline protocol.
scanner_correction_note: Scanner output composite 76.4 / Established does not match canonical ai-labs.json (Aleph Alpha rank 2 / composite 81.4 / band exemplary / all dimensions 4.0 except EQU 3.5). Used canonical 81.4 as published baseline. Scanner may have been derived from a draft or pre-publication state.
key_evidence: April 24 2026 (recent, supports in-window assessment): Cohere announced merger with Aleph Alpha at ~$20B combined valuation, anchored by $600M Schwarz Group commitment. Canada-Germany Sovereign Technology Alliance signed earlier 2026 provides governmental scaffolding. Structured as simultaneous acquisition and Series E funding round. Cohere $7B pre-deal valuation merged with Aleph Alpha $3B book value. STRUCTURAL EVENT — material governance transition.

Cohere CEO public framing: Aleph Alpha's focus on 'small language models, European languages and tokenizers' is complementary to Cohere's large-language-model general focus — preserves Aleph Alpha's product specialisation and German-language workflow integration.

Aleph Alpha signed EU's General-Purpose AI Code of Practice (one of 26 signatories alongside Amazon, Anthropic, Google, IBM, Microsoft, OpenAI) — pre-August-2 GPAI enforcement positive ACC/INT signal. Aleph Alpha public stance: 'champions transparency, responsibility and collaboration from the beginning.'

Aleph Alpha received 2026 Global Recognition Award for sovereign AI infrastructure — recognition for building European-government-and-enterprise advanced-AI infrastructure without conceding data control to US providers.

GDPR-native architecture: all infrastructure operates exclusively within German data centers under EU energy and environmental standards; no dependence on US hyperscale cloud providers; on-premises deployment options. Structural ACC/BND positive.

Pharia-1 model + PharIA AI platform: regulatory compliance (EU AI Act alignment); on-premises deployment; deep integration with German-language workflows — model-card / system-architecture transparency present at product level.
EU AI Act GPAI enforcement August 2 2026 (87 days from May 7 baseline date): Aleph Alpha is positioned as compliant pre-enforcement; pre-stage compliance posture confirmed.

Pentagon AI cohort context: Aleph Alpha NOT a member of US Pentagon classified AI cohort (Microsoft, Amazon AWS AI, Google/Alphabet, OpenAI, Reflection AI, Nvidia AI, SpaceX AI, Oracle AI); positioned as NATO-aligned sovereign-AI alternative — structural BND/INT distinguisher.

Math-hygiene check: 8 dimensions with 7 at 4.0 and EQU at 3.5 → mean dimension = 3.9375 → composite reconstruction = ((3.9375 - 1) / 4) * 100 = 73.4. Published 81.4. Discrepancy +8.0. Parallel pattern to Apptronik / 1X Technologies / Open Bionics (math-hygiene cluster). Flag raised; composite change NOT proposed in evidence cycle per cluster protocol.

evidence.source: Aleph Alpha — A Signature and a Stance: Why We Signed the EU's General-Purpose AI Code of Practice
evidence.finding: Aleph Alpha public commitment to transparency, responsibility, collaboration; signed EU GPAI Code of Practice pre-August-2 enforcement.

evidence.source: Euronews — Some 26 tech companies sign up to EU Commission's AI Code
evidence.finding: Confirms Aleph Alpha among 26 signatories of EU GPAI Code of Practice (Amazon, Anthropic, Google, IBM, Microsoft, OpenAI also signatories).

evidence.source: TechCrunch — Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
evidence.finding: Merger rationale; transatlantic AI powerhouse positioning; Aleph Alpha product-specialisation preservation under Cohere.

evidence.source: Futurum — Cohere Acquires Aleph Alpha: Deal Born of Sovereignty, Necessity
evidence.finding: Sovereign-AI rationale; €6.8B / $20B combined valuation; reverses US acquisition pattern of European AI labs.

evidence.source: CNBC — Cohere to acquire German AI company Aleph Alpha as it looks to expand in Europe
evidence.finding: Acquisition coverage; $20B combined valuation; Schwarz Group $600M anchor commitment.
2026 Global Recognition Award for sovereign AI infrastructure; European-government-and-enterprise AI without US-provider data-control dependency.

evidence.source: AI Business Review — Cohere Acquires Aleph Alpha in Sovereign AI Deal
evidence.finding: Acquisition framed as sovereign AI deal; April 24 2026 announcement; Canada-Germany government scaffolding.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 4.0 confirmed. A1 detection: GDPR-native architecture + EU data-residency surfaces suffering-and-misuse signals at infrastructure level; A4 amplification: EU AI Act compliance posture and GPAI Code of Practice signatory status amplify regulatory accountability.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 4.0 confirmed. E1 affective resonance: 'transparency, responsibility and collaboration from the beginning' founding posture; sovereign-AI framing acknowledges European-citizen data-rights and self-determination concerns.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 4.0 confirmed. AC2 proportionality: pre-Aug-2 GPAI Code of Practice signing is proportionate pre-enforcement compliance; Pharia-1 + PharIA operational with on-premises options.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 3.5 confirmed. EQ2 distributional awareness: sovereign-AI access concentrated among European governments and large enterprises; small-language-model focus and European-language tokenizers support non-English-dominant access (partial offset). 3.5 anchor at established/exemplary boundary.
scoring_rationale.BND: 4.0 confirmed. B3 scope clarity: GDPR architecture defines data-handling boundaries at infrastructure layer; B5 consent: on-premises deployment and EU-only data residency provide structural consent framework. Pentagon-cohort non-membership is INT/BND-positive distinguisher.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 4.0 confirmed. AB2 transparency: GPAI Code of Practice signatory; model-reasoning-visibility architecture (source documents and decision chains behind outputs); EU AI Act alignment publicised. AB4 reparation: GDPR-native architecture provides structural reparation pathways for data-handling concerns.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 4.0 confirmed. S1 causal reasoning: sovereign-AI infrastructure operationalises systemic-harm reasoning at data-residency level; Canada-Germany Sovereign Technology Alliance provides multilateral systemic scaffolding. Cohere merger introduces governance-transition risk but the merger itself is structured to preserve sovereign-AI thesis (not abandon it).
scoring_rationale.INT: 4.0 confirmed. I1 consistency: declared 'transparency, responsibility, collaboration' from-the-beginning mission consistent with GPAI Code signing, GDPR-native architecture, sovereign-AI positioning, and merger structure (preserves Aleph Alpha product specialisation). I2 non-performance: limited gap between marketing and operational reality.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction yields 73.4 vs published 81.4. Discrepancy +8.0 — MATH-HYGIENE FLAG (parallel to Apptronik, 1X Technologies, Open Bionics cluster pattern). Per cluster protocol, flag raised; composite change NOT proposed in evidence cycle pending data-team formula audit. Published placement is exemplary (>=81); reconstructed placement is established (61-80). Dimension means anchored to evidence and consistent with band-placement evidence; published composite may reflect older scoring formula or dimension-weighting scheme. Note: math-hygiene cluster is confirmed structural in robotics-labs (per May 7 digest); whether the ai-labs index shares the same formula error requires data-team investigation.

math_hygiene_flag.issue: Published composite 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4 from dimension means. Discrepancy +8.0 — identical magnitude and dimension-profile pattern to Apptronik and 1X Technologies (robotics-labs cluster).
math_hygiene_flag.action: Flag for data-team review. Cluster-pattern question: does the ai-labs index share the same formula error as the robotics-labs index? If yes, multiple ai-labs entities at the established/exemplary boundary may require composite recalibration. Per math-hygiene cluster protocol, flag is registered but composite change is NOT proposed in evidence cycle.
math_hygiene_flag.evidence_basis_for_dimensions: All 8 dimensions supported by evidence: GPAI Code of Practice signatory, GDPR-native architecture, sovereign-AI 2026 recognition, EU AI Act compliance pre-enforcement, Pentagon-cohort non-membership, Cohere merger structure preserving product specialisation. EQU 3.5 reflects sovereign-AI access concentration. Exemplary placement would require ~4.25 dimensional average which is not supported.
math_hygiene_flag.cluster_pattern_note: Confirmed +8.0 robotics-labs cluster pattern now potentially extending to ai-labs index. Recommend ai-labs index formula audit alongside robotics-labs audit.

negativeSignals: Cohere acquisition introduces governance-transition risk (Canadian-headquartered acquirer rather than purely-European); $20B combined valuation concentrates sovereign-AI capability among well-resourced enterprises and governments (EQU concentration); Schwarz Group $600M anchor concentrates corporate-investor influence; Pharia-1 model card transparency present but full system-card scope not externally audited.
positiveSignals: EU GPAI Code of Practice signatory (pre-Aug-2 enforcement compliance); GDPR-native architecture with EU-only data residency; on-premises deployment options; sovereign-AI positioning; 2026 Global Recognition Award; Pentagon classified-cohort non-membership (BND/INT distinguisher vs. peers); Canada-Germany Sovereign Technology Alliance multilateral scaffolding; merger structure preserves product specialisation (small language models, European languages, German-language workflows); declared 'transparency, responsibility, collaboration' mission consistent with operational practice; reverses pattern of US acquisitions of European AI labs.
sector_context: AI Labs / European sovereign-AI cluster. Cross-reference: Mistral AI (French sovereign-AI peer), DeepSeek (Chinese sovereign-AI alternative). Aleph Alpha is the highest-ranked European sovereign-AI entity in the ai-labs index (rank 2 published). The Cohere merger creates a transatlantic structure that arguably strengthens (not weakens) sovereign-AI positioning at scale — Canada is a NATO ally and the Canada-Germany Sovereign Technology Alliance provides multilateral scaffolding distinct from US Pentagon classified cohort. Pre-August-2 GPAI enforcement window means baseline timing is appropriate; post-enforcement (August 2026) re-evaluation will be material for operational reality vs. declared compliance.
open_actions_resolved: First agent baseline established for Aleph Alpha at 81.4 / Exemplary (boundary case)
Scanner stale-composite (76.4) corrected against canonical ai-labs.json (81.4)
EU GPAI Code of Practice signatory status registered
Math-hygiene flag raised (+8.0 cluster-pattern; ai-labs vs. robotics-labs scope question)
open_actions_carried: Math-hygiene escalation: published 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4 — cluster-pattern parallel to Apptronik / 1X Technologies / Open Bionics; data-team investigation of ai-labs index formula
EU AI Act GPAI enforcement August 2 2026 — post-enforcement re-evaluation material
Watch: Cohere-Aleph Alpha post-merger governance integration; specifically whether product specialisation and German data-residency are operationally preserved
Watch: Schwarz Group anchor-investor influence on product roadmap and safety posture
Watch: any Pentagon AI cohort engagement signals post-merger (current status: not a member)
Watch: any Cohere-side governance positions (e.g., classified-defense contracts) that may extend to Aleph Alpha operations
